scenarios: Every mempalace mine command documented in the plugin runs against mempalace 3.3.5 without an 'unrecognized arguments' error.
The mempalace-integration skill describes rooms as init-detected from folder structure, not as a mine-time flag.
A structural test fails if any skill/agent/command reintroduces 'mine ... --room'.
acceptance_criteria: No file under skills/, agents/, or commands/ contains a 'mempalace ... mine' command with a '--room' argument.
skills/mempalace-integration/SKILL.md states that mining specifies only --wing and that rooms are auto-detected by 'mempalace init' from directory structure.
tests/test_mempalace_integration.py has a regression test asserting no skill/agent/command instructs 'mine ... --room'; any prior test pinning the --room form is updated.
The historical --room references in CHANGELOG.md are left intact (records of v0.9.4).
